markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Gonto for content creation and align on process.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Voice Alignment:** Gonto wants a single, authentic voice across all platforms (Hypergrowth blog, X), matching his personal X style to ensure genuineness.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Asynchronous Workflow:** The process will be asynchronous, with Gonto providing audio recordings for blog posts and writing all X content himself.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** Gonto will review initial AI-generated docs (style guide, topic library) and record a "branding is everything" audio to kick off the new workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:** The immediate goal is to ramp up Gonto's content for the next two weeks while G is traveling, establishing a co-founder rotation for publications.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)

## Topics

### Gonto's Content Vision & Workflow

  - [**Goal:** Create content with a single, authentic voice across all platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The Hypergrowth blog credits authors, so the voice must be genuinely Gonto's, not a ghostwritten or AI-generated brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**Blog Posts:** GrowthX will generate from Gonto's audio recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**X Content:** Gonto will write all posts himself.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [**Audio Recording Guidance:**](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [**Length:** Flexible (e.g., 2 mins, 1 hr); longer recordings allow for multiple posts.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [**Format:** Informal "talking to myself" style is fine.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

### Initial AI-Generated Assets

  - [GrowthX pre-generated assets from Gonto's podcast and X content to accelerate onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**Assets for Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Blog Post Draft:** "Stop Avoiding Conflict, Start Growing Through It" (from a 2-min audio).](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Key Themes & Content Angles:** A topic brainstorm from the podcast.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Topic Library & Ideas:** A compiled list of potential topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Tone of Voice Guide:** A PDF defining the AI's current voice model.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Feedback Required:**](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [Gonto will review all docs to ensure voice alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [**Action:** Jenn will convert the PDF guide to a Google Doc for easy commenting.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [**New Source:** Gonto provided a link to an old personal blog with his authentic writing style.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### Communication & Cadence

  - [**Primary Contacts:** Gonto, Giulia, and Dante.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [**Scheduling:** Brenda remains the contact for calendar coordination.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [**Communication:** Asynchronous via Slack is preferred.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Protocol:** Tag Gonto in the channel for urgent reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [**Cadence Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - [**Immediate:** Ramp up Gonto's content for the next two weeks while G is traveling.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - [**Long-Term:** Establish a co-founder rotation (e.g., Gonto one week, G the next).](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jenn:**](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [Convert the Tone of Voice PDF to a Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [**Gonto:**](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Review the initial blog post draft for voice alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [Review the Key Themes, Content Angles, and Topic Library docs.](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Record a detailed audio on the topic "Branding is Everything."](https://fathom.video/share/Y_77pVZ78huFR1nnr4CwcPutpQoxh3pb?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
